en: Chile Certificate of Adhesion to a Mutual Society (ISL)
Chile Certificate of Adhesion to a Mutual Society (ISL)

Establishes the occupational accident and occupational disease insurance, which is compulsory insurance paid by the employer, which covers contingencies arising from accidents suffered by a person due to or due to work. It also covers illnesses caused directly by the exercise of the profession or work, and that produce disability or death of the insured; In addition, it extends to commuting accidents and those that affect union leaders in the performance of their union duties. Law 16.744 Art. 4\nPlease reference sample here.
